summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JWT authentication and RBAC features for OpenWebUI clone. All 10 test scenarios passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: Admin user (admin@test.com) was pre-existing. Created test users during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT auth and RBAC fully working. Admin has access to User Management, Connections, and Models tabs. Regular users only see General, Theme, System Prompt tabs. Chat isolation working - users can only see their own chats.

test_scenarios_results.1_signup_flow: PASSED - New user signup works, redirects to main chat UI
test_scenarios_results.2_login_flow: PASSED - Admin login with admin@test.com/admin123 works, shows Admin User name in sidebar
test_scenarios_results.3_admin_user_menu: PASSED - User Management option visible in admin's user menu
test_scenarios_results.4_admin_settings_tabs: PASSED - Connections and Models tabs visible in Settings for admin
test_scenarios_results.5_user_management_modal: PASSED - User Management modal opens and shows users list with roles
test_scenarios_results.6_regular_user_settings: PASSED - Regular user does NOT see Connections or Models tabs
test_scenarios_results.7_regular_user_no_user_mgmt: PASSED - Regular user does NOT see User Management option in menu
test_scenarios_results.8_chat_after_auth: PASSED - Chat functionality works after login, creates chat and gets AI response
test_scenarios_results.9_logout_flow: PASSED - Sign Out redirects to login page
test_scenarios_results.10_chat_isolation: PASSED - Admin's chats not visible to user2, each user sees only their own chats

auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Returns token and user with correct role
auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/signup: PASSED - Creates user, first user is admin, subsequent users are regular
auth_endpoints.GET /api/auth/me: PASSED - Returns current user info with valid token, 401 without token

admin_endpoints.GET /api/admin/users: PASSED - Admin can list all users, regular user gets 403

chat_isolation.GET /api/chats: PASSED - Returns only current user's chats
chat_isolation.GET /api/chats/{id}: PASSED - Returns 404 for other user's chat

connections_endpoint.GET /api/connections: PASSED - Admin can access, regular user gets 403
